title: saxifraga maderensis var. pickeringii
intro: Saxifraga maderensis var. pickeringii is a rare, alpine variety of the Saxifraga maderensis plant, commonly known as a rock-jenny or Madeiran saxifrage, which belongs to the Saxifragaceae family of flowering plants. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and soothe skin irritations. The health benefits of Saxifraga maderensis var. pickeringii include its ability to reduce swelling and promote tissue repair, as well as its potential to help manage conditions such as eczema and acne. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in herbal salves and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
